suite.name: Login Scenario

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "args": ["--use-mock-keychain", "--disable-features=AutofillAssistant,PasswordManagerOnboardingPromo", "--disable-save-password-bubble"], "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/Users/yorgo.aoun/Desktop/Robot-mcp/reports/browser/traces/temp/977dc883-ebc3-4689-959a-7adf820885a5"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:5173
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Load State
kw.msg: Waiting page load to state to receive load in 10000.0
kw.doc: Waits that the page reaches the required load state.

test.name: Step 1 - Empty Fields Are Rejected

kw.name: Capture Step Start
Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.
Embeds a screenshot in the report before each step begins.

kw.name: Given I Am On The Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="login-form"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Then I Should Be On The Login Page
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="login-form"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: And I Should Not Be Logged In
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="navbar-user"] at state hidden
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

test.doc: Submitting the login form with no input should keep the user on the login page.

test.name: Step 2 - Invalid Credentials Are Rejected

kw.name: Capture Step Start
Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.
Embeds a screenshot in the report before each step begins.

kw.name: Given I Am On The Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="login-form"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'wrong@shopdemo.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'wrongpassword' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Then I Should See A Login Error
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="login-error"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: The Text Is Not Empty
kw.doc: Asserts a string contains at least one non-whitespace character.

kw.name: And I Should Not Be Logged In
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="navbar-user"] at state hidden
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

test.doc: Wrong email/password should display an error and keep the user on the login page.

test.name: Step 3 - Valid Credentials Grant Access

kw.name: Capture Step Start
Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.
Embeds a screenshot in the report before each step begins.

kw.name: Given I Am On The Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="login-form"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'yorgo@hotmail.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'Test123!' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Then I Should Be Logged In
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="navbar-user"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

test.doc: Correct credentials should authenticate the user and show the main application.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc:
Scenario: User Login
Tests run in order — each step advances the scenario state. Suite Setup opens a single browser session shared across all steps. Suite Teardown closes the browser, resetting state for the next run.
